name: @sta/desktop
description: Santa Teresita Pastas — desktop app (cloud-first, sin Postgres local)

scripts.build: pnpm run ensure:vcredist && pnpm run build:resources && electron-builder --win
scripts.release: pnpm run ensure:vcredist && pnpm run build:resources && electron-builder --win --publish always
scripts.release:draft: pnpm run ensure:vcredist && pnpm run build:resources && electron-builder --win --publish onTagOrDraft
